abstract: Fetch changed record zones in the database.
overview:
## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.DatabaseChangesResponse] object, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

For example, use this method to fetch the zones that changed and then use the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/fetchRecordZoneChanges] method to fetch the changed records in each zone.

items.description: The type of database (public, private, or shared).
items.name: databaseScope

items.description: Fetch changes to the specified record zones in the database.
items.name: fetchRecordZoneChanges

title: fetchDatabaseChanges
